cargo_audit.warning_policy: Cargo Audit vulnerabilities fail the build. Transitive unmaintained or unsound warnings remain visible and require explicit release review because replacing the Tauri/WebKit dependency stack is not locally actionable.

pip_audit_accepted_findings.rationale: The OSV record identifies PyTorch 2.6.0 as the last affected version. pip-audit currently reports the CVE against newer PyTorch releases without an affected-version range.
